action.command: python -c "import json; rows=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/data/unified_train.jsonl')]; print('Train rows:', len(rows)); print('Sample keys:', list(rows[0].keys())); print('Sample:', {k:rows[0][k] for k in ['id','image_path','instruction','image_width','image_height','source','type']}); print('Has bbox:', 'target_bbox' in rows[0], rows[0].get('target_bbox')); print('Has point:', 'target_point' in rows[0], rows[0].get('target_point')); val=[json.loads(l) for l in open('/data/unified_val.jsonl')]; print('Val rows:', len(val)); print('Val sample:', {k:val[0][k] for k in ['id','image_path','instruction','image_width','image_height']})"
